channel.title: Gemini on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Gemini on Arrans github.io

item.title: f/prompts.chat
item.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: manaflow-ai/cmux
item.description: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, MCP, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-5, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active.

item.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

item.title: router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI
item.description: Wrap Gemini CLI, Antigravity, ChatGPT Codex, Claude Code, Qwen Code, iFlow as an OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex compatible API service, allowing you to enjoy the free Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT 5, Claude, Qwen model through API

item.title: lobehub/lobehub
item.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

item.title: Aider-AI/aider
item.description: aider is AI pair programming in your terminal

item.title: gemini-cli-extensions/jules
item.description: A Gemini CLI extension that allows you to use the Gemini CLI to orchestrate the Jules asynchronous agent to perform coding tasks like bug fixing, refactoring, and dependency updates.

item.title: google-github-actions/run-gemini-cli
item.description: A GitHub Action invoking the Gemini CLI.

item.title: sigoden/aichat
item.description: All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.

item.title: Ebrizzzz/Youtube-playlist-to-formatted-text
item.description: A desktop application that extracts YouTube playlist transcripts and enhances them using Google’s Gemini AI models. The output is a book in any language you want.

item.title: modfin/bellman
item.description: Golang lib for LLM APIs, ChatGPT, Gemini and Anthropic
